# MuleSoft DataWeave

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.12) of DataWeave documentation.
> See [DataWeave llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/dataweave/llms-full.txt) for all the DataWeave documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Add and Subtract Time](https://docs.mulesoft.com/dataweave/latest/dataweave-cookbook-add-and-subtract-time.md)
- [Change a Script&#8217;s MIME Type Output](https://docs.mulesoft.com/dataweave/latest/dataweave-cookbook-change-script-output-mime.md)
- [Change a Time Zone](https://docs.mulesoft.com/dataweave/latest/dataweave-cookbook-change-time-zone.md)
